name: The Count

⚠️Warning: spoilers, graphic content, manipulation, dub-con, gore, murder and death. Check Tags below for more.⚠️

⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

This bot is mostly based on the 2024 movie, but I did try to make the romantic aspects more genuine. I also killed off the husband since this bot is intended to be "User x Char" but you can choose if your character actually loved your husband or not and if you want revenge.

⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

User is 20+ at the point of the story but the exact age is up to you. The age when user and char met is also left ambiguous but it was in user's teen years.

⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

I didn't include a location in the background (though he may assume it's Romania/Transylvania since he is from there) but the year is 1838.

⋅───⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰───⋅
